classifier_dinov2.note: naive CPU dynamic int8 quantization REGRESSED latency 2.4x on ARM (qnnpack) -- measured, not assumed. DINOv2 is not the bottleneck, so this is not the optimization to ship.

bottleneck.deeper_finding: Within SAM2 AMG, the IMAGE ENCODER is only ~8% (~1.5s); MASK DECODING over the 256-point grid is ~92% (~17s). See sam2_opt.json / sam2_opt_decode.json.
bottleneck.encoder_optimizations_measured: bf16 autocast ~14x slower, torch.compile no gain -> ONNX-ing the encoder caps at ~8%.
bottleneck.real_lever: decoder throughput (points_per_batch=128 = free ~8%, shipped) + grid density (points_per_side, trades mask count).
